## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Security Impact

Mention any effect on analyzer verdicts, policy checks, MCP input handling, x402 payment flow, RPC simulation, report hashing, or contracts.

## Testing

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] Relevant demo command:

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped and reviewable.
- [ ] New behavior has tests or demo payload coverage.
- [ ] Documentation is updated when behavior changes.
- [ ] New dependencies are justified.
